raw_consumer_statement:
My father had significant fraud on his Barclays credit card. There have been significant gift card purchases. My father never purchased gift cards, and I am surprised that the Barclays fraud group never had any fraud flags to the aberrant patterns that were present. My Father passed away on XX/XX/2024. Barclay card refused to get involved because I was not the primary on the account. I provided a POA, but that was refused because it only had XXXX witness. I submitted all of the fraud information to the office of the XXXX on XX/XX/2024. I didn't get any response from the office of the XXXX. Additional Barclay card does not return calls from the XXXX detective that has been working the case. 

I have never seen a credit card company refuse to help a senior and hide behind internal policies that are designed to not take accountability.
